channel.title: Blog | Saiba's Shogi Portal
channel.description: Shogi columns, tips, and thoughts from Saiba — helping beginners enjoy the game.

item.title: [Shogi] Is 3-Minute Blitz the Cause of Your Plateau? 4 Disadvantages of Short-Time Games for Improvemen
item.description: If you want to improve at Shogi, ultra-fast games can work against you. This post explains four practical drawbacks of short-time formats and why 10-minute games plus post-game analysis are more effective.

item.title: Why I Wrote a Shogi (Japanese Chess) Guide for Global Beginners
item.description: I share why I wrote beginner-focused English Shogi books, what gap I saw after "learning the rules," and how practical thinking can help players start winning and enjoying real games.
